User.title: User
User.description: A user of the platform (traveler or guide).

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

uid.description: The ID of the user who is a guide.

bio.description: A short biography of the guide.

location.description: The primary city/region the guide operates in.

rating.description: The average rating of the guide.

reviewCount.description: The total number of reviews for the guide.

isVerified.description: Whether the guide is verified by the platform.

Tour.title: Tour
Tour.description: An experience or tour offered by a guide.

guideId.description: The ID of the guide offering the tour.

description.description: A detailed description of the tour.

price.description: The price per person for the tour.

duration.description: The duration of the tour (e.g., '4 Hours').

includes.description: What is included in the tour.

excludes.description: What is excluded from the tour.

rating.description: The average rating of the tour.

reviewCount.description: The total number of reviews for the tour.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: A booking record for a tour.

travelerId.description: The ID of the traveler who booked the tour.

guideId.description: The ID of the guide for the tour.

tourId.description: The ID of the tour booked.

totalPaid.description: The total amount paid for the booking.

peopleCount.description: The number of people in the booking.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: A review for a tour or guide.

userId.description: The ID of the user who wrote the review.

tourId.description: The ID of the tour being reviewed.

guideId.description: The ID of the guide being reviewed.
